{ "name": "intervention/image", "description": "PHP Image Processing", "homepage": "https://image.intervention.io", "keywords": [ "image", "gd", "imagick", "watermark", "thumbnail", "resize" ], "license": "MIT", "authors": [ { "name": "Oliver Vogel", "email": "oliver@intervention.io", "homepage": "https://intervention.io" } ], "require": { "php": "^8.1", "ext-mbstring": "*", "intervention/gif": "^4.2" }, "require-dev": { "phpunit/phpunit": "^10.0 || ^11.0 || ^12.0", "mockery/mockery": "^1.6", "phpstan/phpstan": "^2.1", "squizlabs/php_codesniffer": "^3.8", "slevomat/coding-standard": "~8.0" }, "suggest": { "ext-exif": "Recommended to be able to read EXIF data properly." }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "Intervention\\Image\\": "src" } }, "autoload-dev": { "psr-4": { "Intervention\\Image\\Tests\\": "tests" } }, "config": { "allow-plugins": { "dealerdirect/phpcodesniffer-composer-installer": true } } }
